title: Support Equipment and Handling Systems
entry_mechanism: Saudi industrial companies producing non-ITAR munitions support equipment through PSAP Track 3
executive_summary:
Munitions support equipment — hoists, trolleys, loading devices, storage racks, transport containers, and test sets for guided weapons — is the logistics infrastructure that makes a munitions inventory operationally usable. Like GSE in aviation (MA-3), munitions support equipment is manufactured using standard industrial engineering processes and does not require ITAR-controlled technology for the mechanical handling categories.

Saudi Arabia procures hundreds of millions of dollars of munitions support equipment alongside every major weapons purchase — and today, virtually none of it is manufactured in-Kingdom. The equipment is structurally simple: welded steel frames, precision-machined interfaces (to weapon standard dimensions), and safety-rated mechanical systems. Saudi Arabia's Jubail heavy fabrication and machining base is directly capable of producing this equipment once qualification to weapons-specific interface standards is achieved.

Node MS-2 is Phase I priority for the same reason as MA-3 and NV-3: it is the most immediately achievable manufacturing entry point in the missiles and munitions sub-sector, creates early visible GAMI-verifiable Saudi content, and builds the industrial foundation for more complex munitions manufacturing in later phases.

companies.name: DRS Technologies / Leonardo DRS
companies.rationale: Leonardo DRS produces munitions handling and storage systems for US and allied forces. Saudi-qualified variants of standard handling systems are a natural product extension.

companies.name: Thales / TDA Armements
companies.rationale: Thales and associated French defence companies produce munitions support equipment for European weapon systems. Non-ITAR design licensing available.

companies.name: BAE Systems RO Defence
companies.rationale: BAE RO Defence produces munitions support and handling systems and has Saudi Arabia programme relationships.
companies.contact: BAE RO Defence VP International Industrial

companies.name: Moog Defence
companies.rationale: Moog produces precision mechanical components for weapon system interfaces. Saudi manufacturing of non-ITAR Moog-designed components is achievable.

companies.name: Chemring
companies.rationale: Chemring specialises in ordnance safety, handling, and disposal systems. Safety-rated handling equipment design licensing.

partners.name: SAMI Industrial / Manufacturing Division
partners.current: Some industrial equipment manufacturing; programme management for munitions programmes
partners.upgrade: Establish munitions handling equipment manufacturing cell; acquire TDA or Thales design licences; AS9100 qualification; first Saudi-manufactured munitions handling systems for Paveway and Brimstone programmes

partners.name: Zamil Industrial
partners.current: Heavy steel fabrication; precision machining for industrial equipment
partners.upgrade: Munitions handling equipment fabrication; weapon interface dimensional standards; AS9100 certification for munitions support equipment

partners.name: Al-Rashid Trading / Technical Division
partners.current: Industrial equipment supply and some manufacturing
partners.upgrade: Munitions trolley and hoist manufacturing; safety-rated mechanical systems; weapon compatibility testing

partners.name: KFUPM Mechanical Engineering
partners.upgrade: Munitions handling equipment design capability; safety-critical mechanical system standards; graduate placement with SAMI manufacturing
